pageHeading: What a modern storage facility actually looks like.
pageSubheading: Brand new in 2026. Climate-controlled. Gated. Lit. Fenced. Month-to-month. And yes — we'll tell you exactly what we don't have too.
securityIntro: Fence, gate, lighting, and keys you control.
accessIntro: Come and go any hour of any day.
convenienceIntro: Honest lease terms and no move-in fees.
cameraHeading: About the cameras: we're telling you the truth.
cameraParagraph1: Most storage websites advertise "digital video surveillance" whether they actually have it or not. We're not going to. Epic Storage is a brand-new facility as of 2026, and cameras are on our installation roadmap — but they're not there yet.
cameraParagraph2: Here's what we built instead: a fully fenced perimeter, a gated entrance that requires your personal tenant code, dusk-to-dawn exterior lighting, and motion-triggered interior lighting in the climate-controlled units and common areas. Every unit is also individually keyed — only you open yours.
cameraParagraph3: When the cameras are installed, we'll update this page. Until then, we'd rather you choose us knowing what you're getting than regret it later.
security: Perimeter fencing around the entire facility
Motion-triggered interior lighting in climate-controlled units and common areas
Individual unit access (only you have the key)
access: Contactless online rental — rent a unit without ever picking up the phone
Drive-up access available on select climate-controlled units
convenience: Month-to-month leases — leave any time with a 10-day notice
